title: Addis Fairy Original Premium Steel Wool Pot & pan Scourers, Pack of 3, Steel,Stainless Steel,518944
features: Pack of 3 Scourers - For maximum scouring power to remove the toughest of dirt and grease with ease
Ideal for burnt on food and grease on baking trays, pots & pans, grills and outdoor barbeques
Long lasting, for best results use wet with Fairy washing up liquid or similar
Not for use on non-stick pans, plastic bathroom suites, enamel or any other delicate surfaces
Fairy - the brand you can trust - cleaning power for sparkling dishes
description: From the manufacturer Made For Life Addis part of the home since 1780, based in UK. Addis has a 240+ year old history of design, manufacturing and supplying of housewares. The Addis brand still stands today - as it has for previous generations - for value and quality. 3 Pack This Fairy 3 Pack of scourers is ideal for all of your dish-washing needs. Removes thick grime and debris from your dishes and really tackles the oil and grease that lines your pans, and oven trays. Steel This steel scourer is ideal for really accessing all of those tough stains and is extra hard-wearing. Part of the Fairy Range This scourer set is part of the Addis Fairy range. From two trusted brands working together to give you quality, history and results!
